name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle - Premium
description: Updated description for eco-friendly reusable water bottle. Now with improved insulation.

name: Bamboo Toothbrush
description: Bamboo toothbrush with soft bristles and biodegradable handle. Each brush comes in recyclable packaging. Sustainable alternative to plastic toothbrushes.

name: Solar-Powered Portable Charger
description: Solar-powered portable charger with 10,000mAh capacity. Features fast charging technology and built-in LED flashlight. Perfect for outdoor adventures and reducing grid energy consumption.

name: Organic Cotton Tote Bag
description: Organic cotton tote bag made from GOTS certified cotton. Durable, washable, and perfect for grocery shopping. Replaces hundreds of single-use plastic bags.

name: Compostable Bamboo Cutlery Set
description: Compostable bamboo cutlery set including fork, knife, and spoon. Lightweight and perfect for picnics, camping, or takeout. Fully biodegradable in commercial composting facilities.

name: LED Energy-Efficient Light Bulbs
description: LED energy-efficient light bulbs, pack of 4. Uses 80% less energy than traditional incandescent bulbs and lasts 25 times longer. Dimmable and available in warm white.

name: Reusable Silicone Food Storage Bags
description: Reusable silicone food storage bags, set of 5. Dishwasher safe, freezer safe, and microwave safe. Eliminates the need for single-use plastic bags.

name: Organic Hemp Yoga Mat
description: Organic hemp yoga mat made from sustainable hemp fiber. Non-slip surface with natural rubber backing. Free from harmful chemicals and PVC.

name: Recycled Glass Food Containers
description: Recycled glass food containers with bamboo lids, set of 3. Oven-safe, microwave-safe, and freezer-safe. Made from 100% post-consumer recycled glass.

name: Fair Trade Organic Cotton T-Shirt
description: Fair trade organic cotton t-shirt. Made from GOTS certified organic cotton with low-impact dyes. Supports sustainable farming practices and ethical labor standards.

name: Beeswax Food Wraps
description: Beeswax food wraps, set of 3 different sizes. Natural alternative to plastic wrap. Made from organic cotton, beeswax, tree resin, and jojoba oil. Washable and reusable for up to a year.

name: Bamboo Fiber Bath Towels
description: Bamboo fiber bath towels, set of 2. Ultra-soft and highly absorbent. Naturally antimicrobial and made from sustainably sourced bamboo. Machine washable and long-lasting.

name: Solar-Powered Outdoor String Lights
description: Solar-powered outdoor string lights with 50 LED bulbs. Weather-resistant and automatically turns on at dusk. Powered by built-in solar panel, no electricity needed.

name: Stainless Steel Straw Set
description: Stainless steel straw set with cleaning brush and carrying case. Includes 4 straight and 4 bent straws. Reusable alternative to plastic straws, dishwasher safe.

name: Organic Cotton Produce Bags
description: Organic cotton produce bags, set of 5 mesh bags. Lightweight and breathable for fruits and vegetables. Washable and perfect for zero-waste grocery shopping.

name: Recycled Polyester Backpack
description: Recycled polyester backpack made from plastic bottles. Water-resistant, multiple compartments, and ergonomic design. Each bag repurposes approximately 12 plastic bottles.

name: Natural Loofah Sponge
description: Natural loofah sponge for body and face. 100% biodegradable and compostable. Grown without pesticides, naturally exfoliating and long-lasting when properly cared for.

name: Cork Yoga Block Set
description: Cork yoga block set of 2. Made from sustainably harvested cork, naturally antimicrobial and moisture-resistant. Lightweight yet durable, perfect for yoga practice.

name: Reusable Coffee Cup
description: Reusable coffee cup made from recycled materials. Double-wall insulation, leak-proof lid, and fits standard car cup holders. Reduces waste from disposable coffee cups.

name: Organic Cotton Bed Sheets
description: Organic cotton bed sheets, set includes flat sheet, fitted sheet, and 2 pillowcases. Made from GOTS certified organic cotton with OEKO-TEX certified dyes. Soft, breathable, and sustainable.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Eco-friendly reusable water bottle made from stainless steel. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours.
